# Fetch Edge Cases Test
# Tests boundary conditions and special scenarios

# Build the fetch server binary
go build -o mcp-fetch-server .

# Test edge cases
exec mcp-fetch-server <<EOF
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"2024-11-05","capabilities":{"roots":{"listChanged":true},"sampling":{}}},"id":1}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialized","params":{}}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"fetch","arguments":{"url":"https://httpbin.org/status/404"}},"id":3}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"fetch","arguments":{"url":"https://httpbin.org/status/500"}},"id":4}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"get_headers","arguments":{"url":"https://httpbin.org/redirect/1"}},"id":5}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"fetch","arguments":{"url":"https://httpbin.org/delay/1"}},"id":6}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"fetch_text","arguments":{"url":"https://httpbin.org/xml"}},"id":7}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"fetch","arguments":{"url":"HTTPS://HTTPBIN.ORG/GET"}},"id":8}
EOF

# Verify 404 error handling
stdout 'HTTP error.*404'

# Verify 500 error handling  
stdout 'HTTP error.*500'

# Verify redirect handling (should work or show redirect response)
stdout '"statusCode"'

# Verify delayed response handling (within timeout)
stdout '"content"'

# Verify XML content handling
stdout '"contentType".*xml'

# Verify case-insensitive URL handling
stdout '"url":"HTTPS://HTTPBIN.ORG/GET"'

# Should handle uppercase URLs properly
stdout '"statusCode":200'
